_comment: Machine-readable dependency-license policy. Documentation: dev-docs/info/DEPENDENCY_LICENSE_POLICY.md. Enforced by scripts/check_dependency_licenses.py. Edit accepted_exceptions/overrides here; keep the .md in sync.

pylibjpeg-libjpeg.reason: Unresolved Phase 0a blocker for closed-source commercial release. Provides DICOM JPEG Baseline/Extended decoding. Must be removed or replaced (Pillow-only or GDCM/LGPL) before commercial distribution.
